name: Sweet & Sour Prawns
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cornflour with the orange juice until smooth.
2. Combine all ingredients except the prawns in a saucepan.
3. Stir in the orange juice and cornflour mixture, bringing it to a boil.
4. Continue stirring regularly until thick and smooth.
5. If desired, add tomato puree for a reddish color, or crushed pineapple for flavor.
6. Add the prawns and heat through for just two minutes.
7. Do not cook the prawns too long, as they will become rubbery.
8. Serve with rice and stir-fried beansprouts.
